# CODEOWNERS — {{projectName}}
#
# Generated by dafke v{{version}}.
# Each line is a file pattern followed by one or more owners.
# Order matters: later patterns take precedence.
#
# See: https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/managing-your-repositorys-settings-and-features/customizing-your-repository/about-code-owners

# Default owner for everything
* {{defaultOwner}}

# Architecture & infrastructure
/infra/                         {{infraOwner}}
/terraform/                     {{infraOwner}}
/.github/                       {{infraOwner}}
/azure-pipelines*.yml           {{infraOwner}}
Dockerfile*                     {{infraOwner}}
docker-compose*.yml             {{infraOwner}}

# CI/CD pipeline configuration
/.github/workflows/             {{ciOwner}}
/azure-pipelines/               {{ciOwner}}

# Security-sensitive paths (require 2 reviewers + security sign-off)
/src/**/auth/                   {{securityOwner}}
/src/**/security/               {{securityOwner}}
/src/**/crypto/                 {{securityOwner}}
/src/**/identity/               {{securityOwner}}
**/permissions*                 {{securityOwner}}
**/rbac*                        {{securityOwner}}

# Healthcare data paths (require 2 reviewers + security sign-off)
/src/**/patient/                {{healthcareOwner}}
/src/**/prescription/           {{healthcareOwner}}
/src/**/medical/                {{healthcareOwner}}
/src/**/hl7/                    {{healthcareOwner}}
/src/**/kmehr/                  {{healthcareOwner}}
/src/**/ehealth/                {{healthcareOwner}}
/src/**/tarification/           {{healthcareOwner}}

# Data layer
/src/**/database/               {{dataOwner}}
/src/**/migration/              {{dataOwner}}
/src/**/repository/             {{dataOwner}}
**/schema*                      {{dataOwner}}

# API contracts
/src/**/api/                    {{apiOwner}}
**/openapi*                     {{apiOwner}}
**/swagger*                     {{apiOwner}}

# Configuration files
CLAUDE.md                       {{defaultOwner}}
.claude/                        {{defaultOwner}}
.mcp.json                       {{defaultOwner}}
lefthook.yml                    {{defaultOwner}}
.coderabbit.yaml                {{defaultOwner}}

# Documentation
/docs/                          {{docsOwner}}
*.md                            {{docsOwner}}
